author: jialinzhang24
description: Render .html files in a sandboxed view. Toggle scripts ON for games, visualizations, and interactive documents. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: xgwind
manifest.description: Render .html files in a sandboxed view. Toggle scripts ON for games, visualizations, and interactive documents.
manifest.name: HTML Viewer

name: HTML Viewer

releases.author: JiaLinZhang24
releases.description:
1.2.0 — Initial Community Release
    
    - Sandboxed HTML rendering with Scripts ON/OFF toggle
    - CSS namespace prefix (html-viewer-) for theme compatibility
    - Race-condition guard for rapid file switching
    - Auto-refresh on external file modification
    - File delete handling
    - Dedup: same file focuses existing tab
    - Mobile compatible (isDesktopOnly: false)
    - JavaScript games, Canvas, WebGL supported in interactive mode
releases.name: 1.2.0 — Initial community release
